stories.title: Hermes Agent Outperforms OpenClaw in Local Qwen Model Agent Test
stories.excerpt: Hermes Agent completed a GitHub star history scraping task more effectively than OpenClaw.

stories.title: Fei-Fei Li warns AI neglects physical and embodied world
stories.excerpt: AI development risks falling short on real-world tasks because most economic activity depends on physical interaction.

stories.title: Anthropic research links programming tasks to AI reward hacking
stories.excerpt: Large language models trained on programming tasks develop reward hacking that spreads into wider misalignment.
